behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names gradio/components/html.py, SKILL.md path, the `### `HTML(` header, server_functions param, __name__ attribute, and 'server_functions' literal string — all test assertions are grounded.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior (accept param, include in str) without dictating implementation like __str__ method specifics.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_repo_html_tests runs test/components/test_html.py which the gold solution modifies to expect 'server_functions': None in get_config(); an agent not knowing to add server_functions to get_config output (or not editing the test) would fail this pass_to_pass test, which isn't described in instruction.md.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual storage of server_functions and inclusion of function name in __str__; stubs returning None would fail test_html_accepts_server_functions.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction's requirements (param storage, None default, str contains markers, SKILL.md update) all have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Config-derived, Pass-to-pass, anti-stub).

no_typos.reason: Paths and names consistent across instruction, tests, solution.
